A '''species''' of small animals lived on the [[Grass/Legends|grassy]] plains of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]]. Members of the [[Species/Legends|species]] had two hind [[Limb/Legends|limbs]] and two much smaller for-limbs and on their head a pair of [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and a [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]] with lips large relative to the creatures face. They also possessed a pair of small antennae on top of their head, which ended in small nubs. The creature's hides could be [[Color/Legends|pink]] in color with darker pink spots on their back. One member of the species was present in fields near [[Tecave City]] on Cerea when the [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon]] tested the [[Atmosphere/Legends|air]] for the presence of the trace [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] [[Malium]].<ref name="R1" />

==Behind the scenes==
This species appeared in the [[Star Wars (1998) 1|first issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Prelude to Rebellion|''Prelude to Rebellion'']] story arc in the ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' comic book series published by [[Dark Horse Comics]].<ref name="R1" /> It was released on [[December 16]], [[1998]],<ref name="Dark Horse">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/98-022/Star-Wars-1Prelude-to-Rebellion-Part-1-of-6|text=Star Wars 1 Prelude to Rebellion (Part 1 of 6)}}</ref> written by [[Jan Strnad]], and illustrated by [[Anthony Winn]].<ref name="R1" />
